name: barber-crm
description: CRM e Gestão para Barbeiro Autônomo

scripts.build: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
